description: < b> Style Note< /b> We like the ability of spice art to get traditional art forms to complement modern elements to offer an ethnic yet contemporary product that you will want to show off. Beautifully done and designed by skilled craftsmen, these handbags will definitely win you a few compliments. Carry them in style with your ethnic outfit to a family function and impress or style them carefully with a western outfit for a jazzed up look.  < b> Product Details< /b> Brown and black textured handbag with branding at the base Two short straps with a beaded string holding a brand patch on one strap One main zippered compartment with a zippered internal compartment as a divider, organiser sleeves and another internal zippered pocket on the side One concealed zippered compartment at the back One zippered compartment in front with a flap over it with a magnetic closure and metallic Comes with a storage bag < b> Material and Care< /b> Synthetic Wipe with a clean cloth to remove dust < b> Size< /b> Height: 20 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 9 cm Style NoteWe like the ability of Spice Art to get traditional art forms to complement modern elements to offer an ethnic yet contemporary product that you will want to show off. Beautifully done and designed by skilled craftsmen, these handbags will definitely win you a few compliments.
